rows.description: Amounting Money in hands of College
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Amounting Money in hands of College' without adding 'Cash in'. Amounts are consistent between both extractors and visually confirmed. Pence is 0, indicated by a dot in the image.

rows.description: Less due to the College for Battels.
rows.notes: Selected from gpt-5-mini. Its note correctly identifies two numeric groups on this line and justifies selecting the rightmost/final amount (4183 7 11) from the outer columns as the row's value. The description 'Battels.' is also more accurate than 'Batchelors'. gemini-flash's approach of extracting only the inner deduction amount and then inventing a separate total row (gemini-flash's row 5) is incorrect based on the visual layout.
Selected from gemini-flash. The description 'Amounts due at date: -' is visually confirmed, matching gemini-flash's transcription more accurately than 'Amounts due at College:-' from gpt-5-mini.
